findings.description: 3h warning fires during timer interval but not on app-open as specified in acceptance criteria
findings.evidence: if (timerSeconds >= THREE_HOUR_SECS && !threeHourWarningShown) { showToast(...) } — inside setInterval, not on page load
findings.required_fix: Optional: add check on page load (after loadTimerState) to show the warning if saved timerSeconds >= 3h and threeHourWarningShown was already true. However, the core 3h warning during active session is working correctly.

findings.description: Today's sessions summary display ('Today: X sessions, Y min total') below timer is not implemented
findings.evidence: Acceptance criteria item 6 not present in diff: "Today's sessions shown below timer: 'Today: 2 sessions, 75min total'"
findings.required_fix: Optional follow-up: query /api/v1/training-sessions for today and render summary below the timer. Issue was P2/BACKLOG priority.
